content: [{"id":"89c782ab-2981-4f5e-8c55-e3f6b94d4a22","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"c1dcd31c-6376-4d17-87eb-ef9b41fde022","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"66c9e182-5df5-4bfe-a510-e41faaf55612","component":"Divider","data":{"variant":"spacer","size":"md","label":"","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"f419d8f8-1420-41fe-ac79-f5c922f3c386","component":"Text","data":{"content":"Contributors","tag":"h2","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"30px","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"ff3e4cef-e4ee-4236-b564-fee45e9422df","component":"Text","data":{"content":"CodeFolio welcomes contributions of all kinds. Whether you're improving the core system, fixing bugs, writing documentation, suggesting new ideas, or building plugins and components, every contribution helps move the project forward. The goal of CodeFolio is to create a simple, powerful way for developers to present their work and thinking, and that vision benefits from many different perspectives. If you're interested in not only shaping the project, but also helping shape someone else's future, your contribution is more than welcome.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"30px","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"18a3db5b-ac95-4975-bd7b-da82444db877","component":"Text","data":{"content":"The process is simple. Open an issue for a bug, improvement, feature, or suggestion. Then create a pull request that references the corresponding issue ID. Once reviewed, it can be merged into the CodeFolio repository and you’ll be added to the contributors list as a small token of appreciation.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"30px","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"24a2a504-c667-4179-90cd-08eeda2b07be","component":"Text","data":{"content":"If you're a React developer, head over to the app/code/thirdparty directory and see what you can improve. Maybe something feels slow, maybe an edge case isn’t handled, or maybe you have an idea that would make the editor even better. That could be AI-powered content helpers, smarter editing tools, or simple UI improvements that make repetitive tasks easier.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"30px","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"e13d7e06-697d-41f3-9d7f-e8e5fbcd798b","component":"Text","data":{"content":"If you're more of a Node.js enthusiast and enjoy backend architecture, you can explore the decorator-driven Controller, Service, and Entity system. The backend was designed to be flexible, so there’s plenty of room to experiment, improve functionality, or extend the system.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"30px","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"0cff1574-ce53-4479-8815-41402549d54e","component":"Text","data":{"content":"If you enjoy working with components and design systems, you can also help discover new ways to use existing components or create better prefabs that others can reuse in their own projects.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"30px","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"a22867af-502b-4ea3-a9ee-ae9ba9ae3208","component":"Text","data":{"content":"And if you're a UX or design expert, improvements to the editing experience, workflows, or overall usability are always valuable.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"30px","className":""},"children":[]},{"id":"4aa2676d-02d0-481b-ac0b-cd3c3957117d","component":"Text","data":{"content":"No matter your background or skillset, contributions are welcome.","tag":"p","align":"left","weight":"regular","color":"","fontSize":"","fontFamily":"Inter, sans-serif","lineHeight":"","letterSpacing":"","marginBottom":"","className":""},"children":[]}]
